recommendations.title: Kingdoms
recommendations.overview: Alejandro, a freshman, and Sofia, who’s doing her thesis, meet in college. They build an asymmetrical relationship: he’s in love while she just wants to see her sexual desires fulfilled.

recommendations.title: Grave Decisions
recommendations.overview: In this black comedy set in small-town Bavaria, 11-year-old Sebastian thinks you can never be too young to be a murderer. He's convinced that he killed his mother on the day he was born and is certain he's already been condemned to purgatory. Decidin

recommendations.title: Father and Daughter
recommendations.overview: A father says goodbye to his young daughter. In time the daughter grows old, but within her there is always a deep longing for her father.

recommendations.title: Ferry
recommendations.overview: Before he built a drug empire, Ferry Bouman returns to his hometown on a revenge mission that finds his loyalty tested — and a love that alters his life.

recommendations.title: Her

recommendations.title: Belle and Sebastian: The Adventure Continues

recommendations.title: Belle and Sebastian
recommendations.overview: Belle and Sebastian is set high in the snowy Alps during the Second World War. The resourceful Sebastian is a lonely boy who tames and befriends a giant, wild mountain dog, Belle – even though the villagers believe her to be ‘the beast’ that has been

recommendations.title: Playing by Heart
recommendations.overview: In a vibrant tapestry of love and longing, nine interconnected souls navigate romance and heartbreak in L.A., where passions collide and truths unfold, revealing that the heart's desires often lead us where we least expect.

recommendations.title: Notorious

recommendations.title: Spaceman
recommendations.overview: Six months into a solo mission, a lonely astronaut confronts the cracks in his marriage with help from a mysterious creature he discovers on his ship.
